videoSnippet.title: Seed 126: The Unlikely Champion!
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Dehtiarov, Roman (2452) - Anton Guijarro, David (2656)
European Individual Chess Championship 2026 (Chess.com) [11] 2026.04.19
C84 Ruy Lopez, closed defence

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bb5 a6 4.Ba4 Nf6 5.O-O Be7 6.d3 b5 7.Bb3 d6 8.c3 O-O 9.h3 h6 10.Nbd2 Re8 11.Re1 Bf8 12.Nf1 Be6 13.a4 Bxb3 14.Qxb3 Na5 15.Qc2 c5 16.Ne3 Qc7 17.Nh2 h5 18.g4 c4 19.axb5 axb5 20.gxh5 Nxh5 21.Nd5 Qb7 22.dxc4 Nxc4 23.Rxa8 Rxa8 24.Qe2 g6 25.Ng4 Bg7 26.b3 Na5 27.Bg5 Re8 28.Qe3 f5 29.Ra1 f4 30.Qe2 Nc6 31.b4 Kh8 32.Kg2 f3+ 33.Qxf3 Rf8 34.Qe3 Qc8 35.Bh6 Nf4+ 36.Nxf4 exf4 37.Bxf4 Qd7 38.Bh6 Re8 39.Ra6 Ne5 40.Ra7 Nxg4 41.Bxg7+ Qxg7 42.hxg4
